nasb.text: He said, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, who spoke with His mouth to my father David and has fulfilled it with His hand, saying,

esv.text: And he said, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, who with his hand has fulfilled what he promised with his mouth to David my father, saying,

cnv.text: 所羅門說：“耶和華以色列的　神是應當稱頌的，因為他親口對我父親大衛應許過的，現在他親手成全了。他說：

ccb.text: 说：“以色列的上帝耶和华当受称颂！祂亲口给我父大卫的应许，现在祂亲手成就了！
